messages.content: Yes, I am familiar with MQL4. It is a programming language used for developing custom indicators, scripts, and expert advisors for the MetaTrader 4 trading platform.
write a mql4 ea which if rsi goes above 70set a sell order , ask me tp, sl, lot size and resi parameters, and indicate sell oreder with a red medium arrow above hh price
problem which '“Sell”' - undeclared identifier line 	43 column	52
write an ea  in mql4 language which if rsi goes above 70set a sell order
